channel.title: Cheatsheet on Waldy's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cheatsheet on Waldy's blog

item.title: Git Complete Cheatsheet
item.description: A practical Git cheatsheet for daily development — commands, branching, merging, rebasing, stashing, logging, undoing mistakes, and collaboration workflows.

item.title: Regex Complete Cheatsheet
item.description: A practical regular expressions cheatsheet for daily coding — syntax, quantifiers, groups, lookahead, common patterns, and real-world examples in JavaScript, Python, and Vim.

item.title: Vim / Neovim Complete Cheatsheet
item.description: A practical Vim and Neovim cheatsheet for daily coding, navigation, editing, buffers, windows, macros, search, LSP, terminal, and productivity workflows.
